# pdnd_declared_attributes (Data Source)

Lists PDND declared attributes with optional name filter.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pdnd_declared_attributes" "by_name" {
  name = "SPID"
}

output "declared_attribute_count" {
  value = length(data.pdnd_declared_attributes.by_name.attributes)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter by attribute name (case-insensitive contains match)

### Read-Only

- `attributes` (Attributes List) List of declared attributes (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--attributes))

<a id="nestedatt--attributes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `attributes`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
